zh.lifeSummary: 當William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle於1274年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖時，他的父親Robert de Mortimer28歲，母親Joyce de la Zouche19歲。他於1317年2月25日與Alice de Tosny在英國賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1337年2月28日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle was born in 1274, in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Mortimer, was 28 and his mother, Joyce de la Zouche, was 19. He married Alice de Tosny on 25 February 1317, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 28 February 1337, in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle est né en 1274, à Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Mortimer, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joyce de la Zouche, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Tosny le 25 février 1317, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 février 1337, à Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle 1274 in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Mortimer 28 und seine Mutter Joyce de la Zouche 19. Er hat am 25. Februar 1317 in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England Alice de Tosny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. Februar 1337 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle è nato il nel 1274 nel Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Mortimer, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joyce de la Zouche, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Tosny il 25 febbraio 1317, nel Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 febbraio 1337, nel Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castleが1274年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー ド ラ ゾウチで生まれた時，父Robert de Mortimerは28歳，母Joyce de la Zoucheは19歳であった。1317年2月25日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドでAlice de Tosnyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1337年2月28日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーテウケスブリー アビーで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーテウケスブリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀
ko.Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucester: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이
ko.Tewkesbury Abbey, Gloucestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이
ko.Ashby, Leicestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치
ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle(이)가 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Mortimer(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joyce de la Zouche(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1317년 2월 25일 영국 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 Alice de Tosny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1337년 2월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle nasceu em 1274, em Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Mortimer, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joyce de la Zouche, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Tosny em 25 de fevereiro de 1317, em Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1337, em Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle родился в 1274 г. в местности ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Mortimer было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joyce de la Zouche, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Tosny 25 февраля 1317 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 февраля 1337 г. в местности тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle nació en 1274, en Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Mortimer, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joyce de la Zouche, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alice de Tosny el 25 de febrero de 1317, en Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1337, en Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
